name: Golden Hour Photography
description: Romantic and editorial wedding photography with a signature warm, golden aesthetic. We specialize in creating dreamy, magazine-worthy images that highlight the emotion and beauty of your day.

includes: Light retouching on all delivered images
Custom color grading to match your palette
Custom color grading to match your palette

videography_addon.note: Our in-house videographer shoots alongside the photographer for a cohesive look. Same warm, golden editing style applied to video.

album_and_print_addons.note: Full-day package includes a 20-page flush-mount album. 15% discount on all prints for booked clients.

sweeteners: Free mini engagement session for bookings confirmed within 2 weeks
Complimentary rehearsal dinner coverage for full-day packages
Album upgrade (20 to 30 pages) for off-season weddings
15% discount on prints and wall art for booked clients

personality.notes: Loves connecting with couples. Will negotiate on extras but rarely drops base price. Very responsive and quick to follow up. Strong social media presence drives referrals.
